reviews.comment:
Nada del otro mundo, la comida no es muy buena.
Milanes napolitana, la cebolla medias crudas, los cubiertos son malisimos, si no preguntas , no te dan la bebida y no se si estaba el postre o cafe incluido. Es solo cuestión de esmero en la atención. Señores esmero, educación, calidez, SERVICIO, por ello pagamos lo que uds. Dicen en la lista de precio.
Donde esta el responsable que no ve todo esto? Tal vez es un buen compañero y no los manda al frente.....
El resultado ya lo saben,
Nunca Mas al ACA

(Translated by Google)
Nothing special, the food isn't very good. The breaded cutlet with tomato sauce and cheese was half-cooked, the onions were undercooked, the cutlery was terrible, they don't give you a drink if you don't ask, and I don't know if dessert or coffee was included. It's just a matter of attention to detail in the service. Gentlemen, attention to detail, courtesy, warmth, SERVICE—that's what we pay what you list on the price list.
Where is the person in charge who doesn't see all this? Maybe they're a good colleague and they're not reporting you...
You already know the result: Never again to ACA

reviewReply.comment:
Hola, buenas tardes. Nos ayudaría diciendo que plato ha degustado.
Muchas gracias, esperamos pueda regresar nuevamente. Saludos.
